title: gritty steamed mediterranean cornmeal bowl
description: a dense and comforting bowl of white cornmeal, infused with the flavors of the mediterranean, steamed to perfection in a korean brass bowl
instructions: in a large saucepan, bring the water to a boil over high heat.
reduce the heat to medium-low and add the kosher salt and black pepper.
stir to dissolve the salt and pepper, then add the white cornmeal in a steady stream, whisking constantly.
return the saucepan to high heat and bring the mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the cornmeal is cooked and creamy.
while the cornmeal is cooking, heat the olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
add the chopped parsley, mint, lemon zest, lemon juice, and garlic powder to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
to assemble the bowls, place a scoop of the cooked cornmeal in the bottom of each korean brass bowl.
top the cornmeal with the herby oil mixture and serve immediately.
serve hot, garnished with additional parsley and mint if desired.
